title: soroseris gillii subsp. hirsuta
intro: Soroseris gillii subsp. hirsuta, also known as a type of flowering plant, is a subspecies of Soroseris gillii. It is a plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Soroseris gillii subsp. hirsuta include treating fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Traditional herbal preparations of Soroseris gillii subsp. hirsuta include infusions and decoctions, where the plant is steeped in hot water to extract its medicinal properties.
